Skip to content
relay
Claude Code Plugin

Your codebase,
worked by a team.

relay spins up a crew of AI agents — PM, Designer, FE, BE, QA, Deployer — that collaborate inside Claude Code to ship features end-to-end.

Get Started GitHub

Quick install: claude mcp add --npm @custardcream/relay relay-server

How it works

Three commands from zero to shipped — no orchestrator, no extra billing.

01

Install & configure

Add the relay MCP server to Claude Code with a single command. Optionally customise agent personas in agents.yml.

claude mcp add --npm @custardcream/relay relay-server
02

Initialise your project

Run /relay:init once. A team of agents scans the codebase in parallel and writes shared memory to .relay/memory/.

/relay:init
03

Relay a feature

Describe the task. The PM breaks it down, the relevant agents execute it, QA verifies, and the Deployer ships.

/relay:relay "add dark mode toggle"

The team

Seven specialised agents — all powered by Claude Code, zero extra API costs.

  • PM Breaks down requirements, creates tasks, and coordinates the team.
  • Designer Produces design specs, component structures, and visual guidelines.
  • DA Analyses data requirements, schemas, and analytics instrumentation.
  • FE Implements UI components and integrates with backend APIs.
  • BE Builds APIs, services, and database interactions.
  • QA Writes tests, finds edge cases, and validates agent output.
  • Deployer Handles CI/CD, environment config, and final deployment.

Quick start

Up and running in under two minutes.

1. Install

claude mcp add --npm @custardcream/relay relay-server

2. Initialise memory

/relay:init

3. Ship a feature

/relay:relay "add OAuth login with Google"

Why relay?

Designed to be transparent, lean, and composable.

🔗

MCP-native communication

Agents communicate exclusively through MCP tools — send_message, create_task, post_artifact — keeping every interaction auditable and replayable.

💡

Zero extra billing

relay uses only Claude Code's built-in Agent tool. No direct Claude API calls, no additional token costs beyond what Claude Code already charges.

🧠

Persistent shared memory

Each session writes Markdown notes to .relay/memory/. Agents start the next session fully aware of prior decisions and patterns.

📊

Realtime dashboard

A WebSocket-powered Kanban + message feed shows exactly what each agent is thinking and doing as it happens. Full session replay included.

relay
